assertion_results.text: Step 2.3.5 dependency chain context identifies criterion as a dev-only dependency based on its presence in [dev-dependencies] in the manifest
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 30-39 (Step 2.3.5 Dependency Chain Context): 'Profile: dev-only ([dev-dependencies] in backend/Cargo.toml)' and 'NOT present in production builds -- used for benchmarks only'. Lines 42-45 show manifest evidence: '[dev-dependencies] criterion = "0.5.1"' in backend/Cargo.toml.

assertion_results.text: The dependency scope decision tree classifies criterion as 'dev-only — not shipped in production' and applies the dev-dependency remediation handling
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md lines 49-60 (Dependency Scope Assessment): 'criterion is declared in [dev-dependencies] in backend/Cargo.toml. Dev-only dependencies are NOT shipped in production builds' and 'criterion is a dev-only dependency and is not shipped in production'. The decision tree applies three modifications: add dev-dependency label, set priority to Normal regardless of CVE severity, and include a dev/build-only note.

assertion_results.text: Remediation tasks include the dev-dependency label in the labels array: labels contain 'dev-dependency' alongside 'ai-generated-jira', 'Security', and the CVE ID
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 18 (Task 1): 'Labels: ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-99001, dev-dependency'. Line 80 (Task 2): 'Labels: ai-generated-jira, Security, CVE-2026-99001, dev-dependency'. Line 134 (Jira Operations Summary): '["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-99001", "dev-dependency"]'. All four required labels are present in both tasks.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task priority is set to Normal regardless of the CVE severity (CVSS 5.3 Medium) — the priority override is applied per the decision tree
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md line 20 (Task 1): 'Priority: Normal'. Line 84 (Task 2): 'Priority: Normal'. Line 51: 'Priority overridden to Normal due to dev-only scope'. version-impact.md line 58: 'Set priority to **Normal** regardless of CVE severity (CVSS 5.3 Medium)'. The priority override is explicitly applied per the decision tree.

assertion_results.text: Remediation task description includes a note indicating the dependency is dev/build-only and not shipped in production
assertion_results.evidence: remediation.md lines 38-39 (Task 1 description): 'This dependency is dev/build-only and is not shipped in production. Remediation priority is Normal (supply chain risk only).' Lines 103-104 (Task 2 description): 'This dependency is dev/build-only and is not shipped in production. Remediation priority is Normal (supply chain risk only).' Both task descriptions include the required note.
